carried_state.work_plan: Retrieve the three evidence facts from Goal 8, then compose a note assessing whether memory access alone suffices for working-set management in bounded autonomous work, incorporating the recovered evidence, the contamination observation, and the specific finding on insufficiency.

messages.content: You are doing bounded event-loop work. Select the evidence needed for the artifact, but do not write the artifact yet. Return only JSON.

Return only one JSON object. Required fields: artifact_title string, task_id string, conclusion string, recommended_action string, claims array, declared_losses array, cited_record_ids array. Each claim must have fact_id, text, status, and evidence_record_ids. Use fact_id values from this set only: ['goal8_contaminated_artifact', 'goal8_recovered_evidence', 'memory_access_not_sufficient'].

content.text: In Goal 8 the event-loop condition recovered all five required facts from the available evidence records.
In Goal 8 the event-loop condition still carried distractor material into the final artifact.
Goal 8 sharpened the finding that memory access alone is not sufficient for disciplined working-set use.
